title: Revised direction issued to Herefordshire Council: February 2025
body: "This direction requires the council to continue to co-operate with the commissioner appointed by the Secretary of State for Education.  It follows:   an Ofsted inspection report of Herefordshire Council local authority children’s services published 21 September 2022 that judged services to be inadequate across all sub judgements  independent reports from the Secretary of State’s Commissioner for Herefordshire Children Services   This direction replaces the Revised direction issued to Herefordshire Council in March 2023. "
